forecast-period.text: A high pressure system centred over Tasmania extends a ridge over SA. The high and ridge will move eastwards on Sunday and a low pressure trough is expected to reach the far west of the state on Sunday. The trough will slip southeastwards early next week, followed by a cold front mid week.
For latest warnings go to www.bom.gov.au, subscribe to RSS feeds, call 1300 659 210* or listen for warnings on relevant TV and radio broadcasts.
* Calls to 1300 numbers cost around 27.5c incl. GST, higher from mobiles or public phones.

Isolated light showers east of the ranges and near southern coasts. Isolated showers developing in the far west. Possible morning fog about the Agricultural Areas and possible patchy frost in the South East districts. Maximum temperatures below average. Northeast to southeast winds, tending east to northeasterly throughout the day.

Isolated showers possible about the Flinders district and southern parts of the North East Pastoral district. Maximum temperatures below average. East to southeasterly winds, tending northeasterly in the far west.

Morning fog patches about eastern districts. Isolated showers possible in most districts, though most likely about western districts. Chance of a thunderstorm about the far west. Maximum temperatures generally below average, though tending to above average in the far northeast. North to northeasterly winds, fresh at times.

Isolated showers possible in all districts, though most likely about the northeast. Chance of a thunderstorm in the far northeast and Eyre Peninsula. Maximum temperatures near average. Northerly winds, fresh at times, turning westerly in the far west.

text.p: Isolated showers possible about central and eastern districts, and developing about the far west later. Maximum temperatures near average though tending to above average above the north. North to northwesterly winds fresh at times.
Cumulative rainfall totals to the end of Tuesday: broadly 2-10 mm. Isolated falls of 10-20 mm are possible about parts of Kangaroo Island and pastoral districts.
